events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: `decision: needs_more_info` — the evidence on hand (pre-task setup photos + signed briefing) confirms planned controls were staged, but nothing verifies fire watch, extinguisher/hose, combustible clearance, or the post-work watch were actually maintained once hot work began, which NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926.352 require. Flagged that gap and listed the specific verifications needed before a pass/fail can be issued.
